name: Print Statement
description: A basic debugging tool. Prints critter state to stdout, sometimes catching them off guard.

name: Breakpoint
description: Halts execution at a precise moment. More reliable than print debugging.

name: Try-Catch
description: Wraps the target in an exception handler. High success rate, but failures let the critter counter-attack.

name: Linter
description: Statically analyzes the critter for vulnerabilities. Moderate catch rate but consistent results.

name: Formal Proof
description: A mathematically rigorous containment method. Highly effective but expensive to deploy.

name: Small Patch
description: A quick code fix that patches over minor damage. Restores a small amount of HP.

name: Hotfix
description: An emergency production patch. Restores a moderate amount of HP in a pinch.

name: Full Rebuild
description: Wipes the build cache and recompiles from scratch. Fully restores HP to maximum.

name: Git Revert
description: Rolls back to a known good state. Revives a fainted critter at half health.

name: Move Disc: Buffer Overflow
description: A disc containing the Buffer Overflow technique. Equip to a critter's third move slot.

name: Move Disc: Mutex Lock
description: A disc containing the Mutex Lock technique. Equip to a critter's third move slot.
